defaultLines: We need to find that village.
You can find the village on the map.
Just head east and you'll find it.
I'll try to repair the Niobe.
I must get word to the king!
We thought the beach goblins would finish us for sure.
Seeing a fresh face from the sea still feels like a miracle.
If you plan to stay, Wolf's End can use another brave soul.
Living out here toughens you up.
Watch out for wolves near the old road.
It's not safe to travel alone after dark.
I've been in these parts for years.
If you're heading east, be careful.
Our village might be small, but we are strong.
The goblins have been more aggressive lately.
We need brave heroes to protect these lands.
I do what I can for the people here.
Stay a while, adventurer. You're safe here.
Best prices in the realm!
Fresh goods, just arrived!
Can I interest you in something?
I have rare items from the east.
Business is good.
Keep your guard up!
Again! With more feeling!
Pain is weakness leaving the body.
Focus on your breathing.
You have potential, recruit.
Are you friend or foe?
Do you bring message from our friends in Sark?
We cannot trust strangers.
I keep watch over the road at night.
Something stirs in the old ruins to the south.
Did you see those lights last night?
I used to be a soldier, you know.
Stay sharp, friend.
Thank you for freeing me!
Our fighters need their leader.
Someone named 'Nephit' is trying to control the goblins.
My father read through the old reports from when we landed 50 years ago.
There is another tomb. Maybe what Nephit sought is in there.
Someone named 'Nephit' is trying to control the goblins.
We've seen a lot of undead coming from the Tomb of the Slumbering King.
Baron Hocke employed the wisest men in the world for his research.

lines: If Nephit's moving the goblins, I want his name buried for good.
The old reports mention graves, kings, and a scholar who dug too deep.
When you're ready, I'll tell you what we found.

defaultLines: There is another tomb. Maybe what Nephit sought is in there.
Nephit might've wanted dragon bones.
The tomb is to the south, through the woods.

lines: Another tomb means another secret Nephit wanted.
Whatever waits down there, it isn't sleeping peacefully.
If a dragon is involved, I'd rather hear about it from you than from rumors.

defaultLines: With Wolf's End secure, we can reclaim more of the land from evil.
We've got a lot of hard fighting ahead, but we can do it.
This whole land was once green pasture.

lines: The east road is open, but that doesn't make it safe.
If you mean to carry this fight further inland, don't go alone.
Wolf's End can finally breathe, but only just.

defaultLines: Goblins stole all our horseshoes and made noserings.
The big goblins wear horseshoes as noserings.
If there were fewer goblins, we could reclaim this land.
I haven't seen the goblins this excited in years.
You're one tough goblin fighter.
This place might be saved yet.

lines: If those goblins are wearing our horseshoes, bring them back.
Mockery is easier to stomach when you can melt it down afterward.
A working forge needs iron more than pride.
The fewer goblins between here and the hills, the better I sleep.
We've got land worth taking back if someone keeps clearing the pests.
Every goblin you drop buys this town another day.

defaultLines: The goblin shamans use their wands to control Death Eyes.
It will be nice not to have those evil things spying on us.
I hate the way those Death Eyes look at me.
Thanks again for your help.

lines: Those Death Eyes drift too close to town after dark.
A goblin shaman's wand might finally keep them off us.
I would love to sleep one night without glowing eyes at the window.
The goblins are getting reckless. That's when they make mistakes.
Push them harder and they'll break.
Fear travels fast through a raider camp.

defaultLines: There are goblin raiders holed up in that farm.
We've got the trogs cornered.
You've got the goblins on the run.
As long as we keep up the pressure...
We can reclaim this land.

lines: Looters scattered my cargo all over that farm.
I'd settle for my supplies and one day without goblins.
Bring my things back and I can keep these people fed.

defaultLines: The undead just keep rising from that crypt.
The old shrine up there is where the undead first came from.
They've been coming ever since.
I'll keep fighting them.
I'll never get used to their smell.

lines: The old graveyard was bad enough before the bones started walking.
Something in that crypt keeps stirring them up.
Put the worst of them down and maybe the rest will remember they're dead.

defaultLines: Are you friend or foe?
Do you bring message from our friends in Sark?
We cannot trust strangers.
